# MR-MOSS packaged examples

These examples are generated from the manuscript Supplementary Data 03 and 04 files.
Each directory contains an analysis-ready `summary_stats.tsv.gz`, `outcome_correlation.tsv`, `domain_map.tsv` and `metadata.tsv`.
Use `list_mrmoss_examples()`, `load_mrmoss_example()` and `run_mrmoss_example()` from R.
